(404)PETITIONER APPEARED WITH COUNSEL. RESPONDENT APPEARED WITH COUNSEL. GEORGE LAU WAS SWORN AS CANTONESE INTERPRETER FOR THE PETITIONER. JENNIFER MASSEY WAS SWORN
AS CANTONESE INTERPRETER FOR RESPONDENT. COUNSEL MET WITH THE COURT IN CHAMBERS. IF THE FATHER STAYS IN THE BAY AREA: THE SON SHALL RESIDE WITH THE
FIRST WEEKEND OF THE MONTH AND AT THE FATHER'S ON THE THIRD WEEKEND OF THE MONTH. THE FATHER SHALL NOT MOVE THE SON TO TEXAS WITHOUT A COURT ORDER.
ALL RESIDE WITH ONE PARENT FOR HALF THE SUMMER AND CHRISTMAS, AND WITH THE OTHER PARENT FOR THE OTHER HALF OF SUMMER AND CHRISTMAS. THE SON MAY
1998. EXCHANGES WILL BE AT THE GRANDPARENTS' HOUSE. FATHER SHALL INFORM OPPOSING COUNSEL AND THE MOTHER IMMEDIATELY IF HE WILL BE RELOCATING TO
